blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-02-26.
10,360 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-25 -> 2026-02-26)

- "Which city will be reported as the site of a deadly cross-border air strike on a civilian treatment facility by 19 March 2026?" → Kabul
- "Which senator will publicly say he plans to introduce legislation "ASAP" to ban prediction markets by March 2026?" → Chris Murphy
- "Who will be elected MP for Gorton and Denton in the UK parliamentary by-election by 27 February 2026?" → Hannah Spencer
- "What Russian ship will Sweden identify as having launched a drone flight without permission near a visiting French aircraft carrier, by 28 February 2026?" → Zhigulevsk
- "What club will Newcastle United host in the UEFA Champions League round of 16 first leg on March 10, 2026?" → Barcelona

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (196 resolved, 134 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
